title: NextFlow
description: A Node.js REST API backend with a stateful task orchestration engine that tracks execution across concurrent multi-step automation jobs, with low-latency event routing and sub-second loads on Vercel.

title: BrainPin
description: A RESTful Express + MongoDB backend with JWT-based stateless auth, Zod validation and bcryptjs hashing. Tuned indexing keeps read latency under 200ms; the React frontend uses Zustand, Radix UI and Framer Motion with full theme support.

title: BuildFolio
description: A modular Node.js + TypeScript content generation pipeline that parses user input, invokes LLM APIs and produces a complete resume draft in under 10 seconds, with a Cerebras-backed Python microservice for context-aware suggestions.
